历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 5439 → 6310 → 10426 → 9009 → 4951 respectively. In 2025, the ranking significantly advanced to 4951, the best level in the past five years, dropping sharply by 4058 places compared to 2024, indicating high volatility. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi Physics Category from 2021 to 2024 was 27 → 27 → 27 → 23 students, increasing to 26 in 2025, and planned to be 28 in 2026, an expansion of about 7.69% compared to 2025, which has a certain alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Political Science and Law is a 211 and Double First-Class university, ranking 56th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking. Its law discipline is rated A+, making it the top law school in China, with outstanding university level and disciplinary strength. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to a 2016 campus safety incident), but its Douyin popularity ranks 6th overall (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index of about 9.75 million. The continuous influence of famous teachers like Professor Luo Xiang attracts attention, keeping application enthusiasm high. In 2024, the law category in Inner Mongolia science stream saw a sharp drop in admission scores, but no obvious gap signal was observed in Guangxi Physics Category. Law A+ is unique nationwide and directly corresponds to the university's law majors, with extremely prominent disciplinary advantages, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of law majors in 2024 is assessed as differentiated and wait-and-see, generally hot but showing divergence. In 2026, the total number of candidates in this region is about 392,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 269,000, an increase of about 3.26% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to Guangxi candidates. The university_enrollment_summary does not include data for China University of Political Science and Law, so the local enrollment proportion cannot be calculated.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal advancement of the 2025 ranking (4951) with potential correction pressure, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 7.69% easing competition, the slight increase in total candidates intensifying competition, and the sustained high Douyin heat attracting applications, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly retreat compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5209, with a range of 4709–5709.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4709–5709, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 core law majors and experimental classes as sprint targets, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 4900), focus on attacking Law (Finance Dual Bachelor's Degree) and core law majors. If the ranking is in the middle of the range (about 5000–5400), prioritize core law majors and the International Business experimental class. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (above 5500), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors, while also considering Tier 3 majors as safety.
